violations.text: Pre-packaged candy in the food establishment are lacking labels in English. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address in English. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025
The receptacle in the women's restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
